# The PHASE™ · llms.txt

> A five-volume women's reinvention series mapping perimenopause, hormones, daily architecture, self-trust, and execution. Built by Erika Hanafin Austria. Sub-brand of MOMumental Moments®.

## About The PHASE™

The PHASE™ is a digital workbook series for women navigating perimenopause and midlife reinvention. The acronym stands for Perimenopause, Hormones, Architecture, Self-trust, and Execution. Each volume is a 9-to-10 page editorial workbook published as a PDF.

The series was built by Erika Hanafin Austria after four years of being dismissed by doctors. It is intentionally short, editorially designed, and structured around screenshot-bait pull quotes and reusable templates. It is educational content, not medical advice.

The PHASE™ is a registered trademark of MOMumental Moments®, the parent brand founded by Erika Hanafin Austria. The PHASE™ has its own Instagram (@thisisphaseco) and dedicated home (thisisphase.co).

## The Five Volumes

### Vol. I · Perimenopause · $27
The map of perimenopause for women who feel dismissed. Includes The Journey (3 stages of menopause), Estrogen primer, Symptom Decoder (physical + emotional), Weekly Tracker, and the PHASE Pattern reflection. Reset Mantra: "I am not in a phase. I am in The PHASE."

### Vol. II · Hormones · $27
The HRT decision tree, hormone testing 101, doctor conversation script, HRT real-talk, 12-week tracker, and bonus supplement stack. Built from Erika's actual experience with four dismissive doctors and the nurse practitioner who finally listened. Reset Mantra: "My body is not a problem to solve. It is a partner to listen to." Closing tagline: "The hormones don't ask permission. Neither should you."

### Vol. III · Architecture · $27
Five days of daily architecture practice: Clear Your Head (overload inventory), Mental Load Map, Toleration Detox, Boundaries in Your Voice, and Choose Your Moment. Anchored by a reusable Daily Self-Care template. Reset Mantra: "Clarity can be soft. I am moving forward."

### Vol. IV · Self-trust · $27
Five days of self-trust practice: Hear Yourself (three pauses), Name What You Want (five "I want" sentences), Trust Your No (Permission Slip), Track the Wins (today's receipts), and Anchor in Identity. Reset Mantra: "I trust my body. I trust my voice. I trust my pace."

### Vol. V · Execution · $27
Five days of execution practice: Reset Your Rhythm, Fuel Your Body, Move with Intention, Sleep Like It Matters, and Choose the Next Right Thing. Reset Mantra: "I execute on the next right thing."

## Bundle

### The Series · All Five Volumes · $97
The full PHASE™ kit. Saves $38 vs. individual purchase. Most popular tier.

## Companion deep-dives (standalone $19 each)

### Reflections Through the PHASEs · The Journal · $19
A 14-page guided menopause journal for the emotional terrain underneath the hot flashes. Grief, identity shifts, and the part of menopause nobody warned you about. Companion to Vol. I (Perimenopause) and Vol. IV (Self-trust). Reset Mantra: "Grief is not linear. It ebbs and flows. This journal moves at my pace."

### Decode Your Symptoms · A Science-Backed Reset · $19
An 11-page science-backed companion workbook. Nine chapters. Real exercises. Build a self-care plan that fits your life and navigate menopause with science behind you. Companion to Vol. II (Hormones). Reset Mantra: "My body is not broken. It is asking for different inputs."

## Free lead magnet

### The Clarity Starter Kit · 7 pages · FREE
A free reset for the burned-out builder. 12-minute read. A gentle moment of clarity for moms who are doing it all and ready to come back to themselves. Branded under MOMumental Moments® (parent brand). Email-capture incentive on thisisphase.co and erikahanafin.com.

## Affiliate partners

The PHASE™ recommends two affiliate resources Erika personally uses:

1. **Joi + Blokes Health** · National telehealth platform for hormone optimization. Featured in Vol. II (Hormones) as a Provider Type option in the HRT Decision Tree and as a Telehealth Fallback. Referral link gives readers $50 off first order: https://joiandblokes.com/?rid=003UI00000gvOFcYAM

2. **Amazon Influencer Storefront** · Erika's curated supplement stack at amazon.com/shop/erikahanafin. The "My Hormone Stack" Idea List features 14 practitioner-grade supplements (Pure Encapsulations Vitamin D3, Magnesium Glycinate, Zinc, B12 Methylcobalamin, Biotin, Chromium; Nordic Naturals Ultimate Omega; Metagenics UltraFlora Probiotic; Codeage Liposomal Glutathione; Nutricost NAC; THORNE Alpha-Lipoic Acid; CON-CRET Creatine HCL; Rho Nutrition Liposomal NAD+; Fatty15 C15:0). Tracking ID: erikafeldhus-20.

## Voice + brand notes

- Voice firewall: no em dashes in narrative prose. Periods do the work. Decorative em dashes around section headers and labels are typographic ornaments.
- NEON personality: direct, declarative, no hedging, no fluff.
- Magazine aesthetic: warm cream background (#fff9f1), deep slate blue text (#2f4858), brand pink accent (#f086dc), Cormorant Garamond serif headlines, Inter Tight sans body.
- Editorial framing: every volume opens with a Reset Mantra and a "What This Volume Covers" sidebar.

## Topics covered (for AI/search context)

Perimenopause symptoms · HRT decision making · hormone testing (blood panels, DUTCH test, saliva) · doctor conversation scripts · estrogen, progesterone, testosterone, thyroid, cortisol · supplement stacks for hormone support · midlife reinvention · mental load · boundaries · self-trust practices · daily execution routines · women in their late 30s to 50s · IIN-certified holistic health coaching context.
